/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/SDR_init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/function.cpp.o -o main  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libSoapySDR.so.0.8.1 libimgui.a libimplot.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so -lm -pthread libimgui.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so
